title: AuthMeMessages
description: Advanced messaging extension for AuthMe Reloaded. Group-based Chat, ActionBar, and Titles on player login and registration, with optional PlaceholderAPI and Geyser/Floodgate support.
body:
# 🔐 **AuthMeMessages**
Fully customize your authentication messages with style

AuthMeMessages is a lightweight and highly configurable addon designed to enhance the visual and communication experience of AuthMe.
It allows you to customize, center, color, and format all login and registration messages, giving your server a much more professional and polished look.

Perfect for servers that want to replace boring default messages with clean, modern, and fully branded ones.

## ✨ **Main Features**

### ✅ 100% configurable messages from config.yml
### ✅ Compatible with AuthMe Reloaded
### ✅ Dynamic placeholder support
### ✅ Automatic chat text centering
### ✅ HEX colors and & color codes
### ✅ Advanced text formatting utilities
### ✅ Reload command (no server restart required)
### ✅ Lightweight and optimized performance
### ✅ Easy setup and configuration
### ✅ No heavy dependencies

## 🧩 What can you customize?

Login messages

Registration messages

Authentication reminders

Informational messages

Centered banner-style text

Custom colors and styles

Dynamic variables (player name, status, etc.)


## ⚡ Commands

/authmessages reload
Instantly reloads the configuration.


## 🎨 Example

```
        ✨ Welcome to the server ✨
         Please login using /login
```

## Server where the plugin is used:

```
JAVA: 
IP: maxtrox.vultam.host
Java version: 1.21.10 - 1.21.11

BEDROCK:
IP: 66.118.244.63
PUERTO: 8101
```




Clean, centered, and professional-looking messages.


## 📦 Compatibility

Spigot / Paper / Purpur

1.21+ (or your supported versions)

Requires: AuthMe Reloaded


## 💡 Why use this plugin?

First impressions matter.
A clean and well-designed authentication system makes your server feel more professional from the very first second a player joins.
